name: Rocky Road Bars/Dessert Show
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Unroll dough into two long rectangles and place in an ungreased 9 by 13 inch pan.
3. Press the dough into the bottom to form a crust.
4. Bake for 5 minutes.
5. Mix together sugar, peanut butter, and cream cheese until smooth.
6. Blend in corn syrup, vanilla, and egg until well combined.
7. Pour the mixture over the crust.
8. Sprinkle marshmallows, peanuts, and chocolate chips evenly over the top.
9. Return to oven and bake for 25 minutes or until firm to the touch.
10. Allow to cool completely before chilling for 1-2 hours.
11. Cut into bars.
